full_text:
Overview of the plan

Build a reproducible pipeline to assess relevance, redundancy, and optimal encoding of features from clinical + spatial analysis + molecular profile


Future goal is to make archetype analysis: Input - normalized patient-level features (HRD, PFI, purity, expression changes, CNV, etc.) Outcome - visualize archetype movement and convergence

Currently focusing on the feature selection and importance analysis

Feature selection

Boxplots to visualize the data
Correlation matrixes (Pearson, Spearman) for manual correlation check
Functions for VIF, LASSO and Random Forest for automatized feature selection
